inputs.label: Target Plant Density
inputs.businessContext: Desired number of plants per square meter after emergence.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired number of plants per square meter after emergence.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkış sonrası metrekare başına istenen bitki sayısı.

inputs.label: Germination Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of seeds that will germinate under normal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of seeds that will germinate under normal conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal koşullarda çimlenmesi beklenen tohum yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Seed Purity
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of pure, viable seeds in the lot (excludes inert matter and other crop seeds).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of pure, viable seeds in the lot (excludes inert matter and other crop seeds).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki saf, canlı tohum yüzdesi (inert madde ve diğer ürün tohumları hariç).

inputs.label: Thousand Kernel Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of 1000 kernels in grams, indicating seed size and quality.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of 1000 kernels in grams, indicating seed size and quality.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1000 tane ağırlığı gram cinsinden, tohum boyutunu ve kalitesini belirtir.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
